changes: Mission Orchestrator: real agent-mission binding (activate, chat, status, log)
5 new API endpoints: activate, status, chat (send/get), event log
Deploy Agents button + Live Status section in mission overlay
Mission-scoped chat: messages routed to assigned agents via gateway
Global overlay manager: dismissAllOverlays() prevents stacking popups
THREE.js crash fix: _sanitizeMaterials() for GLTF cloned materials
Array material support in sanitizer (multi-mat GLTF meshes)
CSRF guard on missions API (origin/referer check)
Atomic writes for mission persistence (.tmp → rename)
Fetch timeout (30s) with AbortController on gateway calls

changelog.title: Mission Orchestrator
items: 🏰 Real missions: agents receive briefs, chat is scoped, status is live
🔧 6 overlay systems unified — no more stacking popups
🎮 THREE.js GLTF crash eliminated (sanitize cloned materials)
🔒 CSRF + body size limits on API
